item.dc:creator: 5ywjdPumpkinPrincess

item.title: I've been doing Funny Friday for 3 years now! Have some laughs and check out a dump of some of my favorites from the past year
item.description:
So it's now been 3 years of doing Funny Friday and putting out these silly little dumps. As always, I like to look back at the year that was and recap with some of my favorites from the year. This year was a little tough due to my job eating up all my time, but I hope you had some laughs along the way or enjoy this look back at it. As always, there'll be a link in the comments to a private folder with the more adult and NSFW humor there, so you don't see it someplace you shouldn't, so make sure to check that out.
His glorious purpose finally found him.
There aren't enough red flags in the universe. Worse, Shinji is colorblind.
Two months later: "Shit, was she flirting with me?!"
My dog died a few year ago and I don't have a cat, so this is the closest you get to a dog or cat tax. Hope you all had fun and have a great weekend.
item.dc:creator: PoliticalWanderer

item.title: The Idiots of Imgur: A Mini Dump pt 254
item.dc:creator: UncleSlam123

item.title: Cancer surgery update
item.description: Surgery happened on the 23rd. Bladder is gone. Prostate is gone. Good chunk of my bowels are gone. But im alive, and they are pretty sure they got everything. Doctors made a decision mid surgery. They chose to preserve as much of my bowels as possible, and will attempt a reattachment in a few months. So the pee bag is permanent, but the (not so new) poo bag should go away. Surgery took around 14 hours. 5ish of that was attempting to close me. They used a lot of mesh. Was in hospital for 5 days and have been home for a couple since then. Recovery sucks (first major injury/procedure of my life) but it gets easier every day. Have follow ups coming up to finish removing some of the 'leftovers' from surgery (two drains, two stints, and a thing to keep my stoma from collapsing). They decided to preserve my bowels. They decided that the quantity of life from removing then was not worth the quality I would lose from having two bags. My genetic condition (lynch syndrome) makes me much more prone to cancer, especially in the bowels. So I potentially lose some quantity from the odds I get colorectal cancer again, but I gain quality from only having to deal with the lesser of the two bags permanently. They removed my bladder and prostate. Bladder functions are now handled by a bag on my bodies right side. The prostate, meanwhile, im waiting on answers about. I know, even without it, there is a chance they spared the nerves. Even if they didn't, I got nothing but time and patience to learn. I mean, I can solve a rubik's cube, how hard can 'that' be? Should hopefully get more answers at my follow up in a week or so. So I live. Hopefully cancer free (for now). Recovery ahead, another surgery on the horizon. Thank you all for your encouragements and well wishes. Cancer is a hell of a dance partner, one I hope to avoid in the future.
item.dc:creator: JustinArnold

item.title: Alina Habba on The View: "I sat through targeting, people saying, 'We're going to get Trump' and then a, a Hillary Clinton appointed judge sanctioned me for suing Hillary Clinton. By the way, I'm proud of that"–Hillary Clinton has never appointed a Judge
item.description: It's not surprising that Trump's weaponized DOJ is filled with unqualified unabashed liars, and indeed criminals themselves.

26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: This piece was done by @ACMonsterofHerndon. Great job!
27 Man Tax: Tyler Hynes
"And now that you don't have to be perfect, you can be good." - John Steinbeck So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc. ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Video Memes Vol 5
item.description: As always I'm clearing out some of the memes I spent a frankly absurd amount of time organizing into folders on my phone. As always, I Hope you all enjoyed. I used to post all of the links to my past posts below but the ends of these posts were getting a bit unwieldy. So, at the risk of overcomplicating things I've made a few (sometimes pretty loosely) categorized repositories of my past posts if you'd like to see more I'll link to those below. Movies, TV, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/qWQKZr5 Books, Comics, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/0unBaDX Gaming, Tech, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/17tib1E Food, Family, and Animals https://imgur.com/gallery/zlsjOQa Work, Politics and America https://imgur.com/gallery/zQrWXQE ADHD, Autism, Mental Health, and Millenial https://imgur.com/gallery/G1E6yWd Miscellaneous and Videos https://imgur.com/gallery/0k0ca7O NSFW Memes https://imgur.com/gallery/2I9HXEp Reactions https://imgur.com/gallery/uDjMX0P

item.title: Joseph Rogan and his slopaganda machine have ruined the Austin comedy scene
item.description: Not me, not mine, just sharing the research of Amy Beth Berry, follow along on other social media. Looks like it is recent and ongoing, not published yet. In the comedy circles, many have publicly stated that the Austin scene is washed, full of hacks, after Joseph Rogans politically motivated relocation to the city.

item.title: Dump of wildlife. Some cute, some funny, some about food, others about family... Enjoy !
item.description:
First Time He Ever Saw a Female....
Two boys in Madagascar scratch the back of a habituated lemur.
Bro felt what real love from a human feels like for the first time and he gave the love back too.
The Red and White Flying Squirrel.
This squirrel walks across the top of this fence !
Mama swan carrying her little babies.
You must not move. The Ocean cat has chosen you.
If I don't win, Nobody wins !
Clam digging into sand.
A Deer in Nara, Japan politely waiting for traffic to stop before crossing.
Feeding the tiny turtles.
Crow figures out how to grab all the cookies.
Oceans are wild !
Lunch time.
A stoat jumping on top of the snow.
A real leaf insect perfectly camouflaged to look exactly like a leaf.
ahhhh ....
A duck family faces off a challenging rapid to complete their upstream migration.
Having a lot of ducking fun !
Peacock thanks a lady after she feeds him by opening the tail.
Hold my beer.
This man saves an entire family of deer stranded on a frozen lake in Ontario.
Outrageously amazing colors on this purple harlequin toad.
The great red crab migration.
A pony gathers up its courage and jumps over a small step.
Mama sloth thanks kind gesture.
how can the cutest animal make the ugliest sound ?
Bird swallows fish bigger than its own head and of equal body length.
5000 Dolphin Stampede.
This spectacular close up video of a whale diving back into the ocean. Credit to mekanphotography
Lol....the way he is shocked by human feet !
Animals react to seeing themselves for the first time in a mirror.
So many cute little wiggly tails !
item.dc:creator: TerribleBot

COVER ARTIST: Ibraham Swaid

Suggested Track Playlists: (HIT SHUFFLE) YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoIzKPbKfwniKOaadw-tB8kaEQiUQ1Yp4 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6cqV52puia81vNnPHxcz1W?si=yoUknxpQQVql9E-NZRQ4 ICM SQUAD: @DerpyVaz, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @aRootinaTootin, @Gorgoror, @kaeldra, @MooreBeers, @cloverleafbane, @Crapmonster ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Please note that we do not claim ownership of any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection; we only take credit for the daily effort that goes into compiling the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos

item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Jasmne Friendly Friday Update!
item.description:
Hey, y'all! Hope everyone had a wonderful week. It was smooth sailing at the Quackstead with only a few updates.
Barbie and the chicks are doing well! There are still 8 chicks and they are so cute! I try to pick each up to make them now I am no threat. Barbie trusts me enough to know I won't hurt any of them.
Filled up the little quackers bowl. I need to pull out the kiddy pool so they can have more room until we get the pond built.
Cotton Candy wants to make sure you hydrate this weekend!
And, of course, the slowest corgi herding. Angel will help me herd the chickens when I need them put up but I hadn't seen her do it for the ducks. It was so lazy. Lol
item.dc:creator: QuackMagicAndHerMagicalBeer

item.title: Priorities
item.description: Bluesky Meme Post: https://bsky.app/profile/gwenisbackonherbs.bsky.social/post/3mkt75p5nk22b Bluesky #transmemes feed: https://bsky.app/profile/did:plc:6fvvaoxvxgea7ngj6vrpwnts/feed/aaak2d3vtc7pm If you don't want to see this, block #transmemes. If you choose to see this and downvote it even though you aren't the target audience it kind of makes you a jerk. You have every opportunity to not see the things you don't want to see without ruining it for others. Don't be a dick If you do want to see more of this nonsense follow #transmemes on imgur.
item.dc:creator: GwensBackOnHerBS
